notes: Completed: CI/CD for ML MLOps Guide (011)
key_concepts: MLOps Principles: Iterative-incremental, automation, CI/CD, versioning, testing, reproducibility, monitoring
Three MLOps Levels: Manual → ML Pipeline Automation → CI/CD Pipeline Automation
Feature Stores: Feast (open source), Tecton (enterprise), Hopsworks (governance)
DVC: Data version control, Git-like for large files, .dvc metafiles
Kubeflow: Kubernetes-native ML platform, Pipelines as DAGs
MLflow: Tracking, Model Registry, Projects, Models, Serving
Monitoring Layers: Service health → Model performance → Data quality → Drift detection
CI/CD for ML: Code + Data + Hyperparameters versioning
Deployment Strategies: Recreate, Blue-Green, Canary, A/B Testing
Experiment Tracking: MLflow, W&B, Neptune, Comet
Data Drift vs Concept Drift: Input distribution change vs Input-Output relationship change
